Module jtamaro

module jtamaro

  • Packages

    Exports
    Package
    Description
    jtamaro.data
    JTamaro data structures.
    jtamaro.graphic
    JTamaro graphics.
    jtamaro.interaction
    JTamaro interaction.
    jtamaro.io
    This package provides procedures to perform input and output for JTamaro classes (such as Graphic, Colors and Sequence) and other common I/O operations (such as reading / writing files and interacting with STDIN and STDOUT).
